summary.value: Software engineer with fullstack and quality engineering experience across healthcare systems, fintech infrastructure, and Web3 platforms — building production features, E2E test suites, and developer observability tooling. Proven track record of shipping reliably in cross-functional, distributed teams.

projects.name: Konseki
projects.details: Developer observability tool for reproducing UI bugs — built with Svelte, TypeScript, rrweb

projects.name: Copilot-J
projects.details: LabLab Open Source AI Hackathon Submission. Open source Github Copilot alternative for VSCode plugging with LocalAI.

projects.name: Grader for CE Boost Up 6
projects.details: Grader website for Freshmen in CE BOOST UP 6 Camp.

technologies.details: React/Next.js, Svelte, Nest.js, Fastify, TailwindCSS, RxJS
Git, Docker, Kubernetes, testcontainers, Playwright, Appium, k6, Amplitude, Datadog
GCP, Firebase, GitHub Actions, Ethereum dApp development, FHIR/EHR health informatics

details: Built and maintained an E2E test suite across web and mobile (Playwright), authoring 10+ PRs that reduced flaky monitoring failures and improved CI reliability across 3 frontend repositories

Drove quality signal initiatives — Datadog telemetry, Chromatic visual regression, and compliance test coverage for consent, PII, and screenshot archival — closing gaps with no prior automated coverage
Coordinated on-time release sign-offs across Growth, Web Platform, and Identity teams including cross-timezone alignment with US engineers; leveraged AI tooling to accelerate test generation
Selected as fellowship during Cohort 2 as contributor
Maintained and implemented features in IPFS web console and libp2p
Drived initiate on Bluesky backup web application using Storacha
Built a Web3 staking platform using Wagmi for on-chain interactions — covering wallet connection, token staking, and reward tracking — from smart contract integration through to frontend UI

Implemented Playwright test suite covering the full crypto wallet flow from wallet connection through on-chain smart contract interaction, establishing automated coverage for a notoriously difficult-to-test surface
Configured GitHub Actions pipelines for automated build and deployment, reducing manual release steps and enabling faster iteration across the team
Developed full-stack modules across frontend, backend, and operations services for a healthcare software platform used in hospital workflows
Integrated hospital 3rd-party services including external FHIR APIs and OAuth-based SSO, enabling secure cross-system identity and data exchange in a regulated healthcare environment
Conducted system load testing that surfaced performance bottlenecks in production-bound services, driving targeted fixes that improved reliability before release
Built DeFi lending and staking interfaces using Web3.js, integrating directly with Ethereum smart contracts to handle on-chain transactions from the browser
Maintained and improved web application stability and UX across multiple active DeFi products
Built venture prototypes across multiple domains — including merchant landing page for delivery app and LINE chatbot — as part of a fast-moving venture builder environment
Developed a full-stack wholesale e-commerce platform including merchant backoffice, customer-facing storefront, and chatbot interfaces

educations.head: B.Eng. Computer Engineering
educations.details: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang, 2018–2021

openSourceContributions.details: Implemented base components, fixed incorrect UI display and refactored models to components
Implemented improvement features e.g. CAR file import, QR Modal for sharing and UX fixes

interests.value: Sports: running, rock climbing, pickleball and recently into tennis
Reading books in various topics e.g. non-fiction, literature and philosophy
